metadata.description: Local marketplace for the LLM Wiki plugins: the wiki-core engine and the X (Twitter) connector.

plugins.name: wiki-core
plugins.description: Core LLM Wiki engine and skills: ingest immutable sources into an interlinked Obsidian-vault wiki, query it through hybrid retrieval, and lint it for structural and semantic defects.

plugins.name: wiki-connector-x
plugins.description: X (Twitter) connector for the LLM Wiki: import likes and bookmarks into raw/ as immutable source markdown and backfill local transcripts for caption-less videos. Depends on wiki-core.
